text.title: Remote Workshop Toolkit Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end walked example applying the remote-workshop-toolkit methodology, producing a valid artefact per `02-output-contract.xml`.

section.title: End-to-end example
section.narrative: Process-map workshop UTC+1/UTC-5 → coverage 0.85 → single session → pre-read ack 0.82 → 3 breakouts each with facilitator/timekeeper/scribe → read-outs synthesised into BPMN draft → decisions logged → parking-lot items routed to scope-creep protocol.

section.title: Resulting artefact
